plugins.name: elixir-phoenix
plugins.description: Idiomatic Elixir & Phoenix skills: conventions, error handling, Ecto, OTP, Oban, JSON APIs, authorization, security, observability, deployment, testing, and Credo checks.

plugins.name: fly
plugins.description: Operate Fly.io infrastructure: hosted Prometheus & VictoriaLogs queries, SSH into live machines, and production database access.

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Rule-based PreToolUse hooks that block noisy Bash habits: decorative banners, status narration, and shelling out past dedicated tools.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Redirect GitHub page fetches to a local shallow clone or gh, instead of lossy page summaries.

plugins.name: kagi
plugins.description: Route web search and page fetches through the Kagi CLI, which searches signed in as you and returns structured results instead of a summary.

plugins.name: papercuts
plugins.description: Log small frictions to PAPERCUTS.jsonl in the moment, so they collect into a map of where the repo needs sanding down; /papercut forks the conversation to mine it for papercuts all at once.

plugins.name: prior-art
plugins.description: Find and reuse existing prior art (libraries, established methodology, official documentation, upstream repos, reusable CI and tooling) before hand-rolling or reimplementing something already solved.

plugins.name: why
plugins.description: Explain exactly why you took an action, citing the context that drove each part of the decision, then propose an in-place fix to whatever source shaped it.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Principles for clear prose, split by who reads it: humans read for meaning and fill gaps with judgment, agents read literally and act on the exact words.
